title: 有馬記念の後に・限界の果て

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon overwhelms the competition at
the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thunderous applause and cheering roars through
the venue. Formidable foes stood in her way,
blocking her at every step...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But her hard work and talent prevailed and gave
fruit to a phenomenal display of speed!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Haha—HAHAHA! Surpass! Overcome! Exceed!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Beyond the latent potential nesting within the
body! Beyond the boundary of speed known to
science!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Transcend all limits! To further and further
heights! Now is the time!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Crossing the finish line in first place, we have
Agnes Tachyon! I repeat, first place, Agnes
Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she finishes the race, she's greeted with a
deafening standing ovation.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: You're my hero!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon forgets to wave as the big screen
captures her looking up to the stands with an
expression of relief.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go to greet her at the runner's tunnel but find
her standing still, looking somewhat
absent-minded.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah. I, um... blundered that one, when I was
on the big screen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In my excitement, I forgot all semblance of social
convention.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
After all, I had gotten oh so close to the dream I
had envisioned.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I start to feel anxious at her sudden silence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She was stunning at today's Arima Kinen. Her
eccentricity captivated the entire audience.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hahaha—AHAHAHA!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, the excitement got the better of me! How
splendid, how superb!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
These are the fruits of my research! Eureka! I've
done it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing that rare, joyous expression—that carefree
and innocent joy exuding from her—I can't help
but let out a grin.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Urgh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, if it isn't Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Honestly, I don't want to see you right now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My, my. I know you lost, but are you actually
expressing some emotion right now?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I can't believe it.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
While running after you... your form... mirrored
that of my friend.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That's... what irks me! It has nothing to do... with
me losing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I mirrored her imaginary friend? If I recall, this
"friend" she speaks of is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: The one and only...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Dear me! What a deeply fascinating subject of
study!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her contented grin is quickly replaced by a
sinister grin as she plunges herself into deep
thought.
